name: Ancho Ranchero Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 whole ear of corn, cut crosswise into 4 to 5 rounds
1 1/2 cups vegetable or chicken stock, or broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed the Ancho peppers and soak in hot water until soft. Puree in a food processor or blender.
2. Roast garlic and tomatoes in a 350 degree oven until softened and darkened in spots.
3. Heat oil in a medium saucepan and saute onions until golden. Add carrots and saute until tender, about 4 minutes.
4. Add roasted garlic and tomatoes, jalapeno, corn, tortilla strips, cilantro, and Ancho puree to the saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Remove and discard the corn and cilantro. Strain the sauce.
6. Add lime juice and season to taste with salt and maple syrup.
